title: Tender Romantic Garlic Oyster Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly tender garlic oyster mushrooms stir-fry that is perfect for a romantic dinner with its mild and earthy flavor notes.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup low-carb-friendly sauce like soy sauce or tamari (low sodium preferred)
Fresh herbs for garnish (e.g., parsley, chives) - optional

instructions: Clean the oyster mushrooms and slice them into thin pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sliced oyster mushrooms and cook for about 2-3 minutes until they start to soften.
Add finely chopped shallots (if using) and garlic, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Cook for another minute.
Pour in the low-carb-friendly sauce and continue to stir-fry for about 1 more minute or until the mushrooms are fully cooked and nicely glazed.
Remove from heat and serve hot with fresh herbs for garnish if desired.
